body:
In light of #2827, this PR hoists the `NCDatasets.sync` to a separate callback so that we can (eventually) and use `Threads.@spawn` to leverage threads (if we have them).

I've also named/annotated `compute_callback` and `output_callback`, so that they show up in the NVTX reports.
title: Group NCDatasets.sync calls

body: This PR adds nsight profiling to the gpu aquaplanet diagnostic edmf job, so that we can understand the performance issues.
title: Add nsys profile to gpu_aquaplanet_diagedmf

body: This PR moves more diagnostic pieces into `get_callbacks.jl`, and simplifies `get_simulation`, in efforts to modularize the callback logic.
title: Simplify `get_simulation`
